name: Radish, Cucumber & Red Onion Salad with Mint & Orange Blossom Dressing

ingredients.item:
200g (7oz) radishes, trimmed and very thinly sliced
1 cucumber
2 small red onions, cut in half and thinly sliced into half moons
70g (2½oz) pine nuts, toasted
ingredients.original:
200g (7oz) radishes, trimmed and very thinly sliced
1 cucumber
2 small red onions, cut in half and thinly sliced into half moons
70g (2½oz) pine nuts, toasted

ingredients.item:
1 tbsp clear honey
1½ tsp orange blossom water
juice of 1 lemon
4 tbsp olive oil
sea salt
freshly ground black pepper
2 x 20g packets of mint, leaves picked and coarsely chopped
